name: Crisis Season — Multi-Objective Optimization
description: Manage a full 16-zone farm across a brutal 90-day crisis season. Simultaneous drought, pest outbreak spreading across zones, market price crash after day 45, and a tight budget. Agent must balance profit, pest containment, and sustainability — all at once.

action_schema.action_type: string — one of: irrigate, fertilize, pesticide, harvest, wait, sell
action_schema.amount: float — water litres for irrigate, tons for sell
action_schema.type: string — fertilizer type: nitrogen | phosphorus | potassium
action_schema.days: int — number of days to wait

grader.description: Composite score: net profit vs max, pest containment, budget and water sustainability

unique_mechanics.zone_interdependency: Pest spreads 30% into adjacent zones daily if untreated
unique_mechanics.neighbor_stress: Failed zones (health < 0.1) stress adjacent zones by +0.05/day
unique_mechanics.market_crash: Prices drop ~30% after day 45 in crisis scenario
unique_mechanics.delayed_rewards: Poor irrigation on day 15 shows as crop loss on day 45

success_criteria: Contain pest outbreak before it spreads to more than 8 zones
Generate net profit above $200 despite market crash
Keep budget above $0 for the full 90 days
Harvest at least 8 of 16 zones before season ends
